title: dortmanna subnuda
intro: Dortmanna subnuda, also known as the Dortmann's fern or subnuda fern, is a type of plant species belonging to the family Blechnaceae, native to tropical regions. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Dortmanna subnuda include reducing inflammation, soothing coughs, and alleviating symptoms of allergies. The plant is often prepared as an herbal tea by infusing its leaves in hot water or as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
